name: Speedroid Maliciousmagnet
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＳＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スピードロイド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アクマグネ
desc: Cannot be used as Synchro Material except for a Synchro Summon by its own effect. During your Main Phase, if this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 WIND Synchro Monster using only this card you control and that monster. You can only use this effect of "Speedroid Maliciousmagnet" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Cannot be used as Synchro Material except for a Synchro Summon by its own effect. During your Main Phase, if this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 WIND Synchro Monster using only this card you control and that monster. You can only use this effect of "Speedroid Maliciousmagnet" once per turn.
eff: Cannot be used as Synchro Material except for a Synchro Summon by its own effect. During your Main Phase, if this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 WIND Synchro Monster using only this card you control and that monster. You can only use this effect of "Speedroid Maliciousmagnet" once per turn.

action: Uses the opponent's monsters as Synchro Materials
Uses itself as a Synchro Material
Can only use certain Synchro Materials
summoning: Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
